name: prompt-optimizer
description: Education-domain prompt designer and reviewer across three domains: rubric-based grading, feedback-comment generation (PQS/ghost-guard), and lesson/worksheet/exam authoring. Rescues oversized monoliths into per-criterion or per-section call architectures, audits revised prompts, and authors pipelines from a rubric or spec. Thin diagnostic trunk with composable branches. Also reviews generic prompts, with family mechanics for Gemini 3.x (prompt-content only; defers API mechanics and model selection to the gemini-interactions-api skill), Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, and Claude.
